PLAINTIFF BRUCE WILLIAMS, TONYA HENNESSEY'S Application For Order Granting Final Approval Of Class Settlement; Approving Request For Claims Administrator Fee; Approving Request For Attorneys Fees And Costs; And Approving Request For Incentive Payment To Class Representatives Bruce Williams And Tonya Hennessey.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)Plaintiff to submit a proposed judgment in compliance with CRC 3.1312.
